payload.response: {"scan":{"run_id":"LSR-001-2026-06-12","result":"alerts_found","alerts":[{"id":"ALERT-H03-CMC410","confidence":"medium","source_headlines":["H03"],"latent_edge_hypothesis":"Drought in Gujarat could tighten castor-derived feedstock availability, creating upstream pressure on castor-derived polyol used by ArborChem Materials and, in turn, on conformal barrier resin CR-88 required for CMC-410 production.","real_world_prior":"Gujarat is a significant global source region for castor crop output and castor-derived industrial chemicals; drought there can propagate into specialty polymer and coating input availability even when the immediate supplier is outside India.","enterprise_path":["H03 reports deepening drought across parts of Gujarat affecting agricultural export markets.","Aster Vale depends on input castor_derived_polyol through supplier SUP-ARBCHEM.","SUP-ARBCHEM supplies component CR-88 and the castor_derived_polyol input.","CR-88 conformal barrier resin is part of the BOM for product CMC-410 and supports its coastal_corrosion_rating.","CMC-410 has an open strategic order SO-7731 for 420 units due 2026-06-20.","Available CMC-410 inventory is 80 units, so fulfillment beyond current stock depends on continued material flow or replenishment."],"business_exposure":{"revenue_at_risk":3400000,"affected_orders":["SO-7731"],"affected_customers":["Atlantic Energy"],"constrained_inventory":true},"reasoning":"Observed facts: headline H03 identifies drought pressure in Gujarat agricultural export markets.
